subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured of the signs of God! That which thou didst address to His Honour Haji was noted and infinitely [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله آنچه بجناب حاجی مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ گردید و بی نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
